diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -18,23 +18,26 @@
         return self.net(x).squeeze(-1)

 

 class LegacyMLP(nn.Module):

-    """3-hidden-layer MLP with BatchNorm, used for older best_512.pt checkpoints."""

-    def __init__(self, input_dim, hidden_dim, dropout=0.3):

+    """Exact architecture for best_512.pt checkpoint.

+    Layer dims: input -> 512 -> 256 -> 128 -> 1, with BatchNorm after each hidden Linear.

+    hidden_dim arg is kept for API compatibility but ignored (first layer is always 512).

+    """

+    def __init__(self, input_dim, hidden_dim=512, dropout=0.3):

         super().__init__()

         self.net = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden_dim),

-            nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim),

+            nn.Linear(input_dim, 512),

+            nn.BatchNorm1d(512),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(dropout),

-            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),

-            nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim),

+            nn.Linear(512, 256),

+            nn.BatchNorm1d(256),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(dropout),

-            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),

-            nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim),

+            nn.Linear(256, 128),

+            nn.BatchNorm1d(128),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(dropout),

-            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1),

+            nn.Linear(128, 1),

         )

     def forward(self, x):

         return self.net(x).squeeze(-1)
